pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Add explicit javax.validation API dependency to resolve potential classpath issues in newer Spring Boot versions.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock standalone dependency for service virtualization in tests.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing with specific configuration and exclusions.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix known issues.
Configure Maven JAR plugin to explicitly set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled via environment variable.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing with specific frontend build steps.
Update JaCoCo plugin exclusions to match new package structure and added classes.
Rename the artifact ID from 'kitchensink' to 'team03' to reflect the project identity.
Update the group ID to match the new project structure.
Add various Maven properties for main class, package paths, and target classes.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install Node.js via nvm to replace the previous Nodesource setup script.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the specific Java application jar.
Copy application source, frontend, and configuration files into the image for the build step.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project name or context.

Modernize the stories glob pattern to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated array format.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework to use react-webpack5.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
